name: bluepy
summary: Python interface to Bluetooth LE on Linux

documentation.readme: Python interface to Bluetooth LE on Linux
usage_sections: New getState() method for Peripheral class
Partial merge #311: aids to debugging; bluepy-helper reports version; fix crash
Partial merge #311 and #302: pair() and unpair() now supported
Fix #169: 0-byte characteristic writes are now supported

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with pybluez/pybluez (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with airgproducts/pybluez2 (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with adafruit/Adafruit_BLESniffer_Python (score=11); pair in the chain planner.

Phase 3: same attack_surface=['ble_4_x', 'ble_5_x', 'ble_mesh'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

Phase 4: same attack_surface=['ble_4_x', 'ble_5_x', 'ble_mesh'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

Phase 5: same attack_surface=['ble_4_x', 'ble_5_x', 'ble_mesh'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [ble_4_x, ble_5_x, ble_mesh] in the Bluetooth category. Fits when the engagement needs: Python interface to Bluetooth LE on Linux.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Python interface to Bluetooth LE on Linux.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/IanHarvey/bluepy.git. Python interface to Bluetooth LE on Linux.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: When you need Bluetooth, use bluepy because Python interface to Bluetooth LE on Linux.
When chaining Bluetooth tools, pair bluepy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bluepy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
